focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor success
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Worth acknowledging the achievement and ensuring Priya feels recognized for the effort.

focus_points.label: Current energy levels and motivation
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be post-project fatigue, personal matters, or just a quiet spell — worth exploring how they're feeling.

focus_points.label: Exploring mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring. Could be a growth area they're interested in — worth discussing how to incorporate this into their role.

focus_points.label: Upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Important to align on upcoming priorities and expectations.

focus_points.label: Support needed for upcoming projects
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Useful to check if there's anything Priya needs from you as they transition into new projects.
